name: Joe's Pawn Shop
description_short: Oklahoma City pawn shop offering collateral-based loans with 90-day terms and fast 5-minute service since 1977.
description_long:
Joe's Pawn Shop was established in 1977 when founder Joe relocated from Fort Collins, Colorado to Oklahoma City with the vision of modernizing the traditional pawn shop experience. What began as a single location focused on fine jewelry and quality customer service has maintained its original mission for nearly five decades, becoming a recognized fixture in Oklahoma City's financial services landscape.

The shop specializes in collateral-based pawn loans, which allow customers to receive cash in exchange for personal items of value held as security. Their core offering is 90-day pawn terms with easy renewal options every 90 days—a differentiator they explicitly promote as unique in the Oklahoma City market compared to the standard 60-day pawn terms offered elsewhere. The company emphasizes speed, advertising service completion in 5 minutes or less, and maintains regular business hours Monday through Friday 9 AM to 6 PM and Saturday 9 AM to 2 PM.

What distinguishes Joe's Pawn Shop is their explicit commitment to the 90-day loan term and the company's stated philosophy: "Take as much time as you need — we're here for you." This positioning suggests a customer-service-oriented approach to pawn lending compared to competitors. The company operates a single location at 1825 NE 23rd Street in Oklahoma City and maintains active communication channels via email and phone.

As with all pawn shops, customers should understand that pawn loans are collateral-dependent transactions where failure to repay results in loss of the pledged item. While the 90-day term and renewal flexibility may provide more breathing room than traditional 60-day pawns, this remains a high-cost borrowing method compared to traditional personal loans or credit-based lending. The business model is straightforward and transparent based on available information, though specific interest rates, loan-to-value ratios, and item acceptance criteria are not detailed on their website.
pros: 90-day pawn terms instead of standard 60 days, explicitly stated as unique in Oklahoma City market
Fast service advertised at 5 minutes or less for loan processing
Easy 90-day renewal options to extend loan terms without additional hassle
Established business with 45+ years of operating history since 1977
Accessible location at 1825 NE 23rd Street with regular weekday and Saturday hours
Multiple contact methods including phone (405-424-8100), email, and Google Business profile
Founder's expertise in fine jewelry evaluation mentioned as core business strength
cons: No specific interest rates, fees, or loan-to-value percentages disclosed on website
Limited hours with no Sunday availability, closing at 2 PM on Saturdays
Single location in Oklahoma City limits accessibility for surrounding areas
Minimal online presence beyond single Carrd landing page—no detailed loan terms or calculator
Pawn loans result in item loss if not repaid, making this a high-risk borrowing method
best_for: Customers needing quick cash against personal valuables with a longer 90-day repayment window
People seeking collateral-based lending without credit checks or income verification
Oklahoma City residents who prefer established local businesses with long operating history
Individuals valuing extended repayment terms and renewal flexibility over traditional 60-day pawns
diagnosis: Joe's Pawn Shop is best for Oklahoma City residents who need immediate cash against personal items and prefer a 90-day term over standard 60-day pawn loans. The main caveat is that pawn lending is a high-cost borrowing method where failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item, and specific terms, rates, and fees are not publicly disclosed on their website.
services: Fast loan processing (5 minutes or less)
In-person walk-in service at physical location
